lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Splatoon Raiders Release Date
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Splatoon Raiders now has a clear launch timeline from first reveal to release day. This section gives the essential date milestones in one fast scan.

steps.title: June 10, 2025: Splatoon Raiders First Reveal
steps.description: Nintendo revealed Splatoon Raiders as the first Splatoon spin-off and introduced the Spirhalite Islands adventure setup.

steps.title: April 21, 2026: Splatoon Raiders Date Confirmation
steps.description: Nintendo published a new treasure-hunting trailer and confirmed the official July 23, 2026 release date.

steps.title: July 23, 2026: Splatoon Raiders Launch Day
steps.description: Splatoon Raiders is scheduled to launch on Nintendo Switch 2 with digital pre-order availability already surfaced on official pages.

steps.title: Regional Timing: Splatoon Raiders Availability Window
steps.description: Regional storefront timing may differ by time zone, so checking the official store page for your region remains the fastest way to confirm unlock timing.

quickTips: Track the two key checkpoints: first reveal and date-confirmation trailer.
Use official Nintendo store pages as the date source of record.
Keep countdown messaging synced to July 23, 2026 unless Nintendo updates it.
Display region-specific launch timing as release day approaches.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Splatoon Raiders Trailer
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: The two anchor trailer beats are the announcement trailer and the release-date trailer. Comparing both quickly shows how Splatoon Raiders positioning evolved.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Announcement Trailer
cards.description: The first trailer introduced the mechanic lead, the Spirhalite Islands setting, and Deep Cut partnership.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Release Date Trailer
cards.description: The newer trailer confirms July 23, 2026 and expands footage for gadgets, exploration, and raid flow.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Footage Comparison
cards.description: A side-by-side check highlights what changed between reveal-era footage and launch-window footage.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Watch Order
cards.description: Watch the announcement trailer first, then the release-date trailer for the clearest progression narrative.

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Splatoon Raiders Gameplay Overview
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: Splatoon Raiders gameplay centers on island runs, combat encounters, loot extraction, camp upgrades, and repeat expeditions.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Core Premise
items.description: You play as a mechanic exploring the Spirhalite Islands with support from Deep Cut.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Combat Loop
items.description: Combat combines ink weapons, gadgets, and pressure from Salmonid enemy groups.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Exploration Flow
items.description: Each run focuses on finding treasure, surviving encounters, and returning with valuable haul.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Camp Upgrades
items.description: Recovered loot feeds upgrades that improve later runs and unlock stronger setup options.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Companion Support
items.description: A Deep Cut ally and the Exploration Bot support combat rhythm and utility while raiding.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Play Modes
items.description: The game is single-player-focused while also supporting local wireless and online co-op modes.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Splatoon Raiders Price and Editions
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: Splatoon Raiders pricing is currently clearest when split by region and purchase format. This module compares US and UK listings for digital and physical availability at a glance.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Standard Digital (US)
cards.description: Price: $49.99. Release date: July 23, 2026. Availability: pre-order now through the US Nintendo product listing.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Standard Physical (US)
cards.description: Price: $59.99. Release date: July 23, 2026. Availability: find retailers for the physical Nintendo Switch 2 edition.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Standard Digital (UK)
cards.description: Price: GBP 41.99 including VAT. Release date: July 23, 2026. Availability: listed on Nintendo eShop UK.

cards.name: Splatoon Raiders Standard Physical (UK)
cards.description: Price: currently not listed. Release date: July 23, 2026. Availability: retail pricing still pending for UK physical listings.

highlights: Splatoon Raiders US digital: $49.99 and pre-order open
Splatoon Raiders US physical: $59.99 retailer availability
Splatoon Raiders UK digital: GBP 41.99 on eShop
Splatoon Raiders UK physical: price pending

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Splatoon Raiders Multiplayer and Co-Op
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Splatoon Raiders is positioned as a single-player-focused action shooter, but raids can also be played with friends. These cards separate mode focus, player counts, and play requirements.

regions.name: Splatoon Raiders Solo Focus and Co-Op Access
regions.description: Splatoon Raiders is described as single-player focused, you play as the mechanic, and raids can include up to three additional players.

regions.name: Splatoon Raiders Player Count by Mode
regions.description: Official listings show Local on one system as 1 player, Local Wireless as 2 to 4 players, and Online as 2 to 4 players.

regions.name: Splatoon Raiders Online and Local Requirements
regions.description: Online play requires a Nintendo Account and Nintendo Switch Online membership. Local wireless requires one console and one game copy per player.

regions.name: Splatoon Raiders Supported Hardware Modes
regions.description: Splatoon Raiders supports TV, Tabletop, and Handheld modes, with one compatible controller needed per player for multiplayer sessions.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Splatoon Raiders News and Updates
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: This timeline keeps the most important Splatoon Raiders beats in order, from first reveal to trailer updates, pre-orders, and regional pricing visibility.

creatures.name: Splatoon Raiders Treasure-Hunting Trailer Published
creatures.description: Nintendo published a new trailer highlighting character creation, gadgets, salvage raids, Salmonid encounters, and the single-player-focused adventure tone.

creatures.name: Splatoon Raiders US Digital Pre-Orders Opened
creatures.description: US digital pre-orders opened at $49.99 and the official listing moved to pre-order status with launch details.

creatures.name: Splatoon Raiders Product Pages Show Launch Specs
creatures.description: Current listings confirm the July 23, 2026 release date, estimated 20 GB file size, supported play modes, and Nintendo Switch Online feature notes.

creatures.name: Splatoon Raiders Physical Pricing and Box Art Coverage
creatures.description: Wider coverage tied official box art with current pricing split: US digital $49.99, US physical $59.99, and UK digital GBP 41.99.

creatures.name: Splatoon Raiders First-Ever Spinoff Reveal
creatures.description: Nintendo announced the first Splatoon spinoff and introduced the mechanic lead, Deep Cut trio, and Spirhalite Islands setup.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Splatoon Raiders Story and Setting
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Splatoon Raiders is framed as an island treasure-hunt adventure. This section breaks the setup into protagonist, setting, goals, companion roles, and the mystery signals around Spirhalite Islands.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Main Playable Character
items.description: You play as the mechanic, a new protagonist who joins Deep Cut on the expedition and can be customized in official footage.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Spirhalite Islands Setting
items.description: The Spirhalite Islands are the core location: a mysterious archipelago presented as a new Splatoon world setting.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Expedition Goal
items.description: The mechanic and Deep Cut travel there to raid for salvage, hunt treasure, and investigate secrets tied to the islands.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Deep Cut Companion Role
items.description: Shiver, Frye, and Big Man join the expedition, and one member can accompany you in the Exploration Bot during raids.

items.name: Splatoon Raiders Island Mystery Signals
items.description: Storm imagery, unusual glow effects, strange structures, a floating base camp, and active Salmonids define the setting's mysterious atmosphere.

unlockMilestones: Review Splatoon Raiders mechanic and Deep Cut role setup
Track Splatoon Raiders Spirhalite Islands lore updates
Follow Splatoon Raiders mystery clues from new trailers

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Splatoon Raiders Deep Cut Characters
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Deep Cut is framed as a core expedition squad in Splatoon Raiders, and each member carries a distinct role across treasure-hunt runs on the Spirhalite Islands.

sections.name: Splatoon Raiders Shiver
sections.description: Shiver joins the island expedition as one of the three core Deep Cut companions, keeping her cool-headed identity while appearing in a rougher, raid-ready look aboard the team base.

sections.name: Splatoon Raiders Frye
sections.description: Frye keeps her high-energy personality in Splatoon Raiders while shifting into an expedition-ready role, with early footage positioning her as part of the team's scavenging and salvage-hunting tone.

sections.name: Splatoon Raiders Big Man
sections.description: Big Man remains the most recognizable silhouette in the crew and helps anchor a familiar team dynamic as Splatoon Raiders moves into a new island setting and adventure format.

sections.name: Splatoon Raiders Deep Cut Field Crew
sections.description: Splatoon Raiders positions Deep Cut as on-the-ground partners for treasure hunts and salvage runs, with one member able to accompany a raid through the Exploration Bot.

growthMilestones: Track Splatoon Raiders Shiver, Frye, and Big Man role reveals.
Follow Splatoon Raiders field-crew updates tied to Exploration Bot support.
Watch new Splatoon Raiders footage for character-specific expedition actions.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: Splatoon Raiders Character Customization
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: The mechanic is a player-shaped lead in Splatoon Raiders, and official material ties character creation, appearance customization, and camp gear upgrades into one progression loop.

priorities.name: Splatoon Raiders Mechanic Lead
priorities.description: You play as the mechanic, a new protagonist who works with Deep Cut across treasure-hunting and salvage-focused expeditions on the Spirhalite Islands.

priorities.name: Splatoon Raiders Character Creation
priorities.description: Nintendo's trailer coverage explicitly confirms character creation as a front-facing feature, making player-defined identity part of the core setup.

priorities.name: Splatoon Raiders Appearance Customization
priorities.description: Official product pages confirm that you can customize your character appearance, supporting personal expression within a story-driven island adventure.

priorities.name: Splatoon Raiders Camp and Gear Upgrades
priorities.description: Splatoon Raiders sends loot back to camp for gear upgrades before the next run, linking customization to both visual style and long-term progression.

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Splatoon Raiders Weapons and Gadgets
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Nintendo positions Splatoon Raiders loadouts around ink-flinging weapons, mechanical gadgets, and Exploration Bot support, with reveal footage also showing a rough makeshift field-weapon style.

groups.name: Splatoon Raiders Weapons and Combat Core

achievements.title: Splatoon Raiders Ink-Splattering Weapons
achievements.description: Official store pages describe the core kit as ink-splattering weapons, keeping classic ink movement and combat pressure central to each raid.

achievements.title: Splatoon Raiders Makeshift Field Weapon
achievements.description: Reveal footage shows the mechanic carrying an improvised-looking weapon, reinforcing a salvage-ready, expedition-built combat style.

groups.name: Splatoon Raiders Gadgets and Bot Support

achievements.title: Splatoon Raiders Mechanical Gadgets
achievements.description: Official descriptions pair weapons with mechanical gadgets, making support gear a major pillar of the Splatoon Raiders adventure loop.

achievements.title: Splatoon Raiders Exploration Bot
achievements.description: The Exploration Bot accompanies raids with a Deep Cut member, helping fend off enemies and collect loot while strengthening the expedition identity.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Splatoon Raiders Spirhalite Islands
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: The Splatoon Raiders Spirhalite Islands combine storm danger, tropical coastlines, salt-cut landmarks, and a floating camp that anchors each expedition run.

faqs.question: What is the Splatoon Raiders cyclone over the Spirhalite Islands?
faqs.answer: The Splatoon Raiders reveal frames a massive cyclone with a mysterious glow as the setting's signature landmark and central visual hook.

faqs.question: How do Splatoon Raiders tropical shores shape exploration?
faqs.answer: Splatoon Raiders presents sandy beaches, palm trees, and mangrove-lined zones that make island routes feel brighter and more open than urban battle spaces.

faqs.question: What defines Splatoon Raiders salt-cut landmarks?
faqs.answer: Splatoon Raiders spotlights halite-like crystal formations and giant grinder-shaped structures that give the islands a distinctive environmental identity.

faqs.question: How does the Splatoon Raiders floating base support raids?
faqs.answer: Splatoon Raiders uses a cobbled-together floating base as the team's social and logistical hub between island expeditions.

faqs.question: Why does the Splatoon Raiders island map matter?
faqs.answer: Splatoon Raiders promotional map shots reinforce a multi-island setting and help frame the adventure as a navigable expedition zone.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Splatoon Raiders Salmonids and Enemies
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Splatoon Raiders enemy guidance brings together confirmed Nintendo details and Salmonid context from the wider Splatoon series, so new and returning players can read encounter coverage quickly.

items.title: Splatoon Raiders confirms Salmonids as the enemy faction
items.description: Official Nintendo store listings frame raids around fighting enemy Salmonids while hunting treasure across the Spirhalite Islands.
bullets: Nintendo US states you fight waves of enemy Salmonids while raiding the islands for treasure.
Nintendo AU describes splatting large enemy groups in this single-player-focused Splatoon adventure.
Official regional pages consistently place this combat on the Spirhalite Islands.

items.title: Splatoon Raiders ties into known Salmonid series context
items.description: Inkipedia describes Salmonids as an amphibious salmon-like species and the main antagonists of Salmon Run in Splatoon 2 and Splatoon 3.
bullets: Series role: main antagonists and enemies of Salmon Run.
Species note: amphibious salmon-like enemies.
Main ink color references include dark green in Splatoon 2 and dark teal in Splatoon 3.

items.title: Splatoon Raiders discussions use established Salmonid families
items.description: Returning players can quickly parse reveal coverage by using the standard Salmonid family groupings already known across the series.
bullets: Lesser Salmonids: Chum, Smallfry, Cohock, Snatcher.
Boss Salmonids: Steelhead, Steel Eel, Scrapper, Stinger, Maws, Drizzler, Flyfish, Fish Stick, Flipper-Flopper, Slammin' Lid, Big Shot.
Occurrence-specific Salmonids: Goldie, Griller, Chinook, Mothership, Mudmouth.
King Salmonids: Cohozuna, Horrorboros, Megalodontia, plus Triumvirate references.

items.title: Splatoon Raiders combat answers Salmonid pressure with tools
items.description: Nintendo positions the mechanic, gadgets, ink weapons, and Deep Cut bot support as the response kit for Salmonid-heavy raid encounters.
bullets: Playable role: the mechanic.
Core kit: mechanical gadgets and ink-focused weapons.
Support layer: one Deep Cut member raids with you through the Exploration Bot setup.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Splatoon Raiders Companion Bot
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Splatoon Raiders presents the Exploration Bot as a core raid partner tied directly to combat, loot handling, and the Deep Cut field role during island expeditions.

items.title: What is the Splatoon Raiders bot called?
items.content: Nintendo UK identifies the companion as the Exploration Bot and frames it as a powerful construct that travels with the mechanic on raids.
bullets: Official name: Exploration Bot.
Official role framing: a powerful construct.
Travels with the mechanic during island raid runs.

items.title: What does the Splatoon Raiders Exploration Bot do?
items.content: Nintendo states the Exploration Bot helps fend off enemies and gather loot, making it a practical support system in the raid loop.
bullets: Combat support during enemy encounters.
Loot gathering help during treasure runs.
Integrated directly into the hunt-for-treasure gameplay cycle.

items.title: How does Splatoon Raiders connect the bot to Deep Cut?
items.content: Official store text explains that one Deep Cut member raids alongside you in a powerful bot, linking companion support to the trio's active field presence.
bullets: A Deep Cut member accompanies the mechanic during raids.
Deep Cut stays active beyond camp setup scenes.
Bot support is a key part of how the trio influences gameplay.

items.title: How does the Splatoon Raiders bot fit progression?
items.content: Nintendo UK ties the companion into a repeat cycle of raiding, returning loot to camp, upgrading gear, and launching the next expedition.
bullets: Raid, collect loot, return to camp, upgrade gear, and head out again.
The game remains single-player-focused while supporting up to three additional players online or local wireless.
This keeps the bot inside the long-term salvage progression rhythm.

faq.title: Splatoon Raiders
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to common Splatoon Raiders questions

questions.question: Is Splatoon Raiders focused on single-player gameplay?
questions.answer: Yes. Splatoon Raiders is positioned as a single-player-focused adventure with optional multiplayer support paths.

questions.question: What is the Splatoon Raiders release date?
questions.answer: Nintendo currently lists Splatoon Raiders for July 23, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2.

questions.question: Does Splatoon Raiders support co-op multiplayer?
questions.answer: Official pages list local wireless and online support ranges in addition to the single-player-focused core experience.

questions.question: Where can I buy Splatoon Raiders officially?
questions.answer: Use the official Nintendo store page for your region to check current purchase and pre-order status.

questions.question: What are the key Splatoon Raiders modules on this homepage?
questions.answer: The Splatoon Raiders homepage covers release date, trailers, gameplay, pre-order, pricing, co-op, story, characters, weapons, specs, and amiibo tracking.

questions.question: Will Splatoon Raiders receive more official updates before launch?
questions.answer: Yes. Trailer drops and official store updates remain the primary channels for new confirmed details.
